summary: Notification system testing completed successfully. All notification API endpoints working correctly. NotificationCenter UI component verified with bell icon, dropdown panel, and empty state display. Backend tests: 15 passed, 3 skipped (no data to test). Frontend UI verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: GET /api/notifications - List user notifications with pagination
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read - Mark single notification as read
PUT /api/notifications/read-all - Mark all notifications as read
Unauthorized access returns 401 for all notification endpoints
Employer can access their own notifications
Admin can list candidates and employers
NotificationCenter UI - Bell icon visible in portal header
NotificationCenter UI - Dropdown panel opens on click
NotificationCenter UI - Empty state shows 'Nu aveți notificări' message
NotificationCenter UI - Badge count displays correctly (0 when no unread)
critical_code_review_comments: notification_service.py: Well-structured with clear separation of concerns (email templates, email sending, in-app notifications, matching algorithm)
notification_routes.py: Proper authentication checks using get_current_user
NotificationCenter.jsx: Good use of data-testid attributes for testing, proper polling implementation (30 second interval)
calculate_match_score function: Comprehensive matching algorithm with 6 criteria (profession, experience, languages, nationality, age, gender)

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/15 passed, 3 skipped due to no test data)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system fully tested. API endpoints: GET /api/notifications, GET /api/notifications/unread-count, PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read, PUT /api/notifications/read-all, DELETE /api/notifications/{id}, DELETE /api/notifications. NotificationCenter component in portal layouts (CandidateLayout, EmployerLayout) with bell icon in top-right header. Profile validation triggers notifications via notify_profile_validation() and notify_employers_of_new_candidate() functions. Email sending configured but may fail silently if SMTP credentials invalid.

triggers: Admin validates candidate profile -> Candidate receives notification
Admin validates employer profile -> Employer receives notification

email_notifications.note: Email sending configured via SMTP. May fail silently if SMTP credentials are invalid or server unreachable.
